text: Version bumps follow semver: patch for fixes/docs, minor for features, major for breaking. After every task that changes product behavior or docs, bump package.json/bunfig.toml, rebuild dist/cli.js, update README/docs/CHANGELOG/upgrade notes, and run release:check.
Must keep documentation set consistent: root README, CHANGELOG, QUALITY.md, docs/*.md, documentation/index.html+app.js+README.md, examples, and extension/marketplace docs when affected.
Release gate: bun run typecheck; bun test; bun run bundle; bun run smoke; bun run secrets:scan; bun run release:check; npm pack --dry-run
